mineral.locality: Brazil, Mexico, Madagascar, Russia, Canada, Myanmar
mineral.key_physics: Apatite is the defining mineral for Mohs hardness 5. Primary mineral in vertebrate bones and teeth (biological apatite = hydroxyapatite). Group includes fluorapatite, chlorapatite, and hydroxyapatite. Neon blue-green varieties owe color to Mn²⁺ and REE substitution. Fluorescence common under SW UV.
mineral.notes: IMA-recognized mineral group. Named from Greek 'apatao' — to deceive — mimics many other minerals.

light_color.primary_color: Neon blue-green, golden yellow, green, violet, colorless
light_color.color_mechanism: Mn²⁺ and rare earth element (REE) substitution; neon blue from Mn²⁺ in Ca²⁺ site
light_color.color_theory_note: H:200 sits in the cyan-teal arc — the boundary between blue (calm, receding, expansive) and green (growth, vitality). High chroma C:0.20 makes it one of the most electrically vivid stones in the database. The neon quality maps to stimulation and activation rather than rest.
light_color.pleochroism: Dichroic — blue/yellow or green/colorless depending on variety
light_color.fluorescence: Strong yellow, blue, or violet under SW UV (variety dependent)

metaphysics.traditions: Stone of manifestation, clarity, and personal power. Blue Apatite stimulates psychic vision and past-life access. Golden Apatite activates will and manifestation. Only stone in the database sharing its mineral with the human body (bones/teeth).
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Biological bridge stone — unique physiological resonance with human form. ClarusLens clarity node and SovereignCore will-activation anchor.

safety.sunlight: Caution — prolonged direct sun may fade neon colors
warnings: Prolonged direct sunlight may fade vivid neon blue-green color

mineral.locality: Pune (Poona), Maharashtra India; Iceland, Greenland, Germany, USA
mineral.key_physics: Phyllosilicate group. Perfect basal cleavage causes sheet-like peeling. Contains 8 structural water molecules — overheating causes irreversible opacity. Green variety = trace V³⁺. Forms pyramidal terminations on cubic prism.
mineral.notes: IMA species: Fluorapophyllite-(K). 'Apophyllite' is the group name. Pune, India is the world-class source.

light_color.primary_color: Colorless/white, pale green, occasionally pink or yellow
light_color.color_mechanism: Colorless = pure; green from trace V³⁺ (vanadium); pink from Mn²⁺
light_color.color_theory_note: L:0.90 is near-white luminosity — the highest light value expresses spiritual transparency and the absence of obstruction. H:140 is a cool yellow-green, the hue of new growth and fresh clarity. The low chroma C:0.06 means the color barely whispers — presence without assertion. In OKLCH theory this is the most 'open' color state in the database.
light_color.fluorescence: Pale green to white under LW UV

metaphysics.traditions: One of the highest-vibration stones in the mineral kingdom. Creates conscious connection to the Akashic records. Clear = pure channel; Green = heart-activated channel. Placed on third eye for interdimensional access. Associated with angelic contact and nature devas.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Highest clarity-to-form ratio in the database. Primary Noosphere access node — the Akashic Mirror maps directly to GAIA's collective memory retrieval system.

warnings: Fragile perfect cleavage — do not drop or impact
Avoid sustained heat — structural water loss causes irreversible opacity

mineral.key_physics: Chalcedony variety of quartz — microcrystalline fibrous silica. Apricot/peach tone from trace Fe₂O₃. Waxy luster diagnostic of all chalcedony. Excellent toughness — no cleavage, conchoidal fracture.
mineral.notes: Trade name. IMA mineral = Chalcedony (SiO₂ microcrystalline).

light_color.color_mechanism: Fe₂O₃ (hematite) trace impurities in chalcedony matrix
light_color.color_theory_note: H:65 is the warm apricot-peach arc — a hue that advances toward the viewer, evoking warmth, nourishment, and safety. In OKLCH color theory it sits between yellow (intellect, energy) and orange (creativity, emotion). L:0.75 at moderate-high lightness creates softness without pastels — the color of ripe fruit at golden hour. This is the most nurturing hue in the database.

metaphysics.traditions: Warm, gentle, emotionally nourishing. Sacral creativity → Solar Plexus confidence → Heart compassion bridge. Supports self-worth, emotional warmth, creative expression. The apricot color maps to warm sunrise — new beginnings with gentle strength.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Warm-spectrum anchor — H:65 fills the orange-warmth gap in the OKLCH color matrix. ViriditasHeart emotional nourishment node.

mineral.locality: Brazil (Minas Gerais), Pakistan, Afghanistan, Russia, Madagascar, USA
mineral.key_physics: Blue Beryl group member. Color from Fe²⁺ in Al³⁺ site. Heat treatment converts Fe³⁺→Fe²⁺ to purify blue. RI 1.577–1.583. Biaxial negative. Dichroic — blue/colorless.
mineral.notes: March birthstone. Beryl group: Emerald (Cr), Morganite (Mn), Heliodor (Fe³⁺), Goshenite (colorless). Named from Latin 'aqua marina'.

light_color.primary_color: Pale to deep sky blue, blue-green, sea-green
light_color.color_mechanism: Fe²⁺ substituting Al³⁺ in beryl lattice; heat treatment removes Fe³⁺ yellow to purify blue
light_color.color_theory_note: H:220 is the sky-ocean blue arc — a deeply receding, expansive hue that psychologically opens space and dissolves boundaries. In OKLCH color theory this hue universally signals trust, calm, and truth-telling. The moderate chroma C:0.16 gives it presence without aggression. Paired with L:0.72 mid-lightness, this is the archetypal 'speaking the truth with a calm heart' hue.

metaphysics.traditions: Ancient stone of sailors, travelers, and seers. Roman legend: treasure of mermaids. Stone of courage, clarity, and communication. Throat chakra activator for speaking deepest truth. Calms the mind, dissolves anxiety, promotes compassionate communication.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Water-element flagship stone. ClarusLens primary blue node. Fe²⁺ blue mechanism mirrors atmospheric sky scattering — ideal for GAIA's atmospheric clarity layer.

safety.sunlight: Caution — prolonged intense sunlight may fade lighter specimens
warnings: Prolonged direct sunlight may fade color in lighter specimens

mineral.key_physics: Trade name for pale blue-green translucent calcite from a single Argentine locality. Color from trace Cu²⁺ and possibly organic inclusions. Perfect rhombohedral cleavage, double refraction visible to naked eye. Soft (Mohs 3).
mineral.notes: Trade name; IMA mineral = Calcite. 'Lemurian' and 'Aquatine' are market names. Single-locality Argentina source.

light_color.color_mechanism: Trace Cu²⁺ and possible organic inclusions in calcite lattice producing pale aqua-blue
light_color.color_theory_note: H:195 is the seafoam-aqua arc — the precise hue where blue (consciousness, depth) and green (life, healing) are in perfect balance. In OKLCH theory this is the most emotionally neutral and psychically open hue in the cool spectrum. L:0.80 high lightness with low chroma C:0.10 creates the quality of morning mist over still water — the ideal state for accessing subconscious material without distortion.

metaphysics.traditions: Connected to Lemurian consciousness tradition — ancient oceanic civilization of intuitive, heart-centered beings. Accesses subconscious emotional memory, dream states, and past-life oceanic records. Transmits empathic intelligence and emotional clarity. Exceptionally gentle — ideal for highly sensitive individuals.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Highest gentleness + psychic access combination in the database. SomnusVeil primary dream-access stone. Lemurian Dreamer archetype maps to GAIA's deep memory retrieval from pre-cognitive emotional layers.

warnings: Soft (Mohs 3) — store separately from harder stones
Perfect cleavage — avoid impact or dropping
